title: Gear Train
goal: Transfers rotational power with predictable speed ratio and torque conversion through meshing gears.
gallery_summary: Transmit rotation with controlled speed and torque ratios using meshing gears.
parts: Driver Gear: Input gear receiving power
Driven Gear: Output gear delivering power
Intermediate Gears: Optional gears for ratio change
Housing: Encloses and protects gear assembly
cautions: Ensure proper gear meshing and backlash
Verify tooth contact pattern during assembly
Use correct lubricant type and quantity
Monitor for unusual noise or vibration
Check for wear on gear teeth periodically
